Dove Deep Moisturizing Cream Beauty Bar Hand Soap Facial or Body, 4oz

If you’re looking for soft, supple and seriously hydrated skin, turn to the #1 Dermatologist Recommended Dove Pink Deep Moisturizing Cream Beauty Bar Soap. Every day, our skin is exposed to damaging environmental factors fluctuating weather temperatures, water and humidity, harsh chemicals and more. Protect your skin from environmental factors with the Dove Pink Deep Moisturizing Cream Beauty Bar Hand Soap, Facial Soap or Body Soap.

The harsh ingredients found in ordinary bar soap can strip your skin's natural moisture and leave a soapy residue, making skin feel tight or dry. With mild cleansers, 1/4 moisturizing cream, shea butter, micellar water, and coconut milk, the Dove Pink Beauty Bar cleanses gently and rinses well, leaving your skin feeling clean, soft, smooth and hydrated. With Dove's mildest cleanser and more natural moisturizers than any other beauty bar, the Dove Pink Beauty Bar is gentle enough for everyday care.

Key Features

  • #1 DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED: Every day, our skin is exposed to damaging environmental factors fluctuating weather temperatures, water and humidity, harsh chemicals and more; Dove Pink Deep Moisturizing beauty bar soap uses Dove’s mildest cleansers, is pH-balanced and includes 25% moisturizing cream, leaving your skin feeling soft, fresh and hydrated even after just one use
  • DEEP MOISTURE HYDRATION: While there are hundreds of bar soap options out on the market, the Dove Pink Deep Moisture hydrating bar soap formula is a trusted brand with effective moisturizing results; it provides the skin with the essential nutrients it needs to stay hydrated and soft using simple, ultra-mild cleansers and natural conditioning moisturizers
  • LUXURIOUS INGREDIENTS: Featuring shea butter, coconut milk, micellar water and a sweet cream and peony scent, the Dove Pink moisturizing bar soap will feel luxurious on your skin; the bar soap features Dove’s mildest cleansers and more natural moisturizers than any other beauty bar; let the rosy color lift your mood while the cleansing formula hydrates and softens your skin
  • SULFATE AND PARABEN FREE: 100% free of parabens, this Dove Pink moisturizing hand soap is free of preservatives found in many other grooming and cosmetic products; it is also 100% sulfate free meaning this hand soap or facial soap won’t strip away naturally occurring proteins and oils that your skin needs making it a great choice for a variety of different skin types including sensitive skin
  • ECONOMICAL TRAVEL BAR SOAP: Solid, compact and lightweight, bar soap is more versatile than body wash as you can pack it with you when you travel; bar soap is also more likely to have a longer lifespan than body wash and cost less; it’s also ideal to toss in your gym bag for a refreshing post workout or fitness session shower

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DBBHSGT475PNK
  • UPC: 855569004248
  • Size: Regular

If you’ve gotten used to using body wash during your morning or post-fitness session shower routine, we’re advocating that you leave the bottle of body wash behind and go back to the bar. Economical, great to travel with and generally boasting a longer lifespan than body wash, toss your Dove Pink deep moisturizing cream bar soap into your gym bag for your next post-workout or fitness class shower.

And, last but not least, this Dove Pink bar soap is 100% paraben AND sulfate-free! Made with Dove’s mildest, most gentle cleansers, Dove bar soap is gentle on your skin’s microbiome (your skin's active living protective layer). Targeting deep layers of the skin, the Dove deep moisturizing formula provides effective, long-lasting skin hydration and starts working with just your first application.

Completely 100% free of parabens, this Dove Pink moisturizing hand soap is free of preservatives found in much other personal grooming and cosmetic products; it is also 100% sulfate-free meaning this hand soap or facial soap won’t strip away naturally occurring proteins and oils that your skin needs, making it a great choice for a variety of different skin types, including sensitive skin!

Go ahead, lather up and enjoy the hydrating benefits of Dove’s Pink Deep Moisturizing Cream Beauty Bar that can be used as hand soap, facial soap or body soap. It will feel luxurious on your skin after just one use; let the rosy color lift your mood, the sweet cream and peony scent invigorate your senses, while the deep moisturizing formula hydrates and softens your skin.
